com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics

Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.

  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics used by com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
    Class
    Description
    FailoverMetricsSnapshotService
    Aggregates the existing failover.* Micrometer counters into a MetricsSummary.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.config
    Class
    Description
    FailoverMetricsSnapshotService
    Aggregates the existing failover.* Micrometer counters into a MetricsSummary.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source
    Class
    Description
    ApiHealth
    Per-API health classification derived from Rates.healthyRate() against configurable thresholds (design doc §4.4).
    InstanceMetrics
    One cluster member's metrics, for the dashboard's per-instance view.
    MetricsSummary
    The /api/metrics response: the global aggregate plus per-API KPIs and a capture timestamp.
    SeriesPoint
    One sample of the cumulative counters, captured by the server-side history sampler (design doc §4.2 / §8 option B).
    SourceInfo
    Provenance of the metrics the dashboard is showing, so the UI can never silently misrepresent single-instance numbers as a cluster aggregate (or vice-versa) — see the distributed-dashboard design.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.prometheus
    Class
    Description
    ApiHealth
    Per-API health classification derived from Rates.healthyRate() against configurable thresholds (design doc §4.4).
    InstanceMetrics
    One cluster member's metrics, for the dashboard's per-instance view.
    MetricsSummary
    The /api/metrics response: the global aggregate plus per-API KPIs and a capture timestamp.
    SeriesPoint
    One sample of the cumulative counters, captured by the server-side history sampler (design doc §4.2 / §8 option B).
    SourceInfo
    Provenance of the metrics the dashboard is showing, so the UI can never silently misrepresent single-instance numbers as a cluster aggregate (or vice-versa) — see the distributed-dashboard design.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore
    Class
    Description
    ApiHealth
    Per-API health classification derived from Rates.healthyRate() against configurable thresholds (design doc §4.4).
    ClusterSnapshot
    The payload one instance pushes to the dashboard in cluster.mode=shared-store: its own identity plus the local MetricsSummary snapshot.
    InstanceMetrics
    One cluster member's metrics, for the dashboard's per-instance view.
    MetricsSummary
    The /api/metrics response: the global aggregate plus per-API KPIs and a capture timestamp.
    SeriesPoint
    One sample of the cumulative counters, captured by the server-side history sampler (design doc §4.2 / §8 option B).
    SourceInfo
    Provenance of the metrics the dashboard is showing, so the UI can never silently misrepresent single-instance numbers as a cluster aggregate (or vice-versa) — see the distributed-dashboard design.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore.jdbc
    Class
    Description
    ClusterSnapshot
    The payload one instance pushes to the dashboard in cluster.mode=shared-store: its own identity plus the local MetricsSummary snapshot.
    InstanceMetrics
    One cluster member's metrics, for the dashboard's per-instance view.
    MetricsSummary
    The /api/metrics response: the global aggregate plus per-API KPIs and a capture timestamp.

    Class
    Description

    Per-API health classification derived from Rates.healthyRate() against configurable thresholds (design doc §4.4).
    FailoverMetricsSnapshotService
    Aggregates the existing failover.* Micrometer counters into a MetricsSummary.
    MetricsSummary
    The /api/metrics response: the global aggregate plus per-API KPIs and a capture timestamp.
    SeriesPoint
    One sample of the cumulative counters, captured by the server-side history sampler (design doc §4.2 / §8 option B).
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.web
    Class
    Description
    ApiHealth
    Per-API health classification derived from Rates.healthyRate() against configurable thresholds (design doc §4.4).
    ClusterSnapshot
    The payload one instance pushes to the dashboard in cluster.mode=shared-store: its own identity plus the local MetricsSummary snapshot.
    InstanceMetrics
    One cluster member's metrics, for the dashboard's per-instance view.
    MetricsSummary
    The /api/metrics response: the global aggregate plus per-API KPIs and a capture timestamp.
    SeriesPoint
    One sample of the cumulative counters, captured by the server-side history sampler (design doc §4.2 / §8 option B).
    SourceInfo
    Provenance of the metrics the dashboard is showing, so the UI can never silently misrepresent single-instance numbers as a cluster aggregate (or vice-versa) — see the distributed-dashboard design.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics used by com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics
    Class
    Description
    ApiHealth
    Per-API health classification derived from Rates.healthyRate() against configurable thresholds (design doc §4.4).
    ApiHealth.Status
    Health status values.
    ApiKpis
    Absolute counts plus derived Rates for one failover point (or "__overall__" for the aggregate).
    ExceptionStat
    One root exception type that triggered failover recovery, with its cumulative count — derived from the failover.exception.total counter, aggregated across all failover points.
    Latency
    Wall-time latency of the failover store and recover paths, in milliseconds, derived from the failover.operation.duration timer.
    MetricsSummary
    The /api/metrics response: the global aggregate plus per-API KPIs and a capture timestamp.
    Rates
    Derived rate KPIs for a failover point (design doc §4.4).
